hero.title: Deliberative surveys for better decisions
hero.subtitle: Give every voice a fair hearing. Deliberix helps communities, organizations, and researchers easily gather people's opinions and better understand where they agree and where their views differ.

features.title: How it works
features.vote-desc: For each statement, participants choose whether they agree, disagree, or skip it.
features.submit-desc: Anyone can propose a new statement that the whole community then votes on.
features.results-desc: Real-time results show where the group agrees and where opinions diverge.
features.moderate-desc: Moderators can review submissions to keep the conversation productive.

usecases.title: Built for
usecases.civic-desc: Let citizens weigh in on local policy, budgets, and community decisions.
usecases.research-desc: Run deliberative surveys with demographic intake and structured data export.
usecases.org-desc: Gather team feedback, prioritize initiatives, and make better group decisions.

cta.title: Ready to start?
cta.subtitle: Create your first survey in minutes. No credit card required.

about.title: About Deliberix
about.intro: Deliberix is a deliberative platform for gathering and analyzing opinions, inspired by Pol.is and All Our Ideas. It helps groups discover consensus, understand differing viewpoints, and lead structured participatory discussion.
about.how-text: Survey administrators create a set of opening statements on a given topic. Participants then rate each statement by choosing "agree", "disagree", or "skip", and can also mark statements they consider important. They can also submit their own new statements, which are then added to the group vote. Real-time results continuously show vote distribution, agreement levels between participants, and importance ratings.
about.open-text: Deliberix is designed to be deployed on-premise or used as a hosted service. Visibility settings, privacy, and result access are fully configurable for each individual survey.
about.who-text: For municipalities, universities, NGOs, companies, and everyone who wants to better understand what a group really thinks. Use cases range from classroom feedback all the way to large-scale public consultations.

contact.title: Contact
contact.intro: Have questions about Deliberix? Want to set up an instance for your organization? Get in touch.

footer.description: Deliberative survey platform for communities and organizations.
